implementationFixes: Removed throw new Error paths from AgentActionPublisher PROPOSE_EDIT/CREATE_FLOW tenant-scope callbacks; failures now return DataProcessResult.failure and skip queue emission.
Centralized FLOW-46 direct CLS access in TenantScopeGateway; AgentRunOrchestrator and AgentActionPublisher now use requireMasterTenant().
Updated platform-agent CRUD Playwright spec to use role=platform-admin, expand the raw index intentionally, and align dynamic API requests with MASTER_TENANT_ID.
Fixed chat Playwright screenshots to write under docs/e2e-snapshots/platform-agent instead of docs/e2e-snapshots/UNKNOWN.
